ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Jeffery Crissman, Esq. 310-935-1111 of Torklaw APC, Moving party.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. Mr. Crissman argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Torklaw APC's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORDfor PLAINTIFF JIMMY QUINTANILLA.

Granted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order on the judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
